EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} logged in to the system via {object.type} on host {event_src.id}
The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} failed to log in to the system via {object.type} on host {event_src.id}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system via {object.type} on host {event_src.id}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the system via {object.type} on host {event_src.id}
